caption: The video appears to be a news segment from PlusTV Africa, focusing on political commentary. The screen is divided into two sections: on the left, there is an image of a man dressed in traditional attire, possibly Bola Tinubu, with the text "Nigeria Needs Me - Bola Tinubu" displayed below. On the right side, there is a smaller inset showing Olusola Oyekanmi, identified as a political analyst from Lagos, who is speaking on the phone. The background features vibrant red and purple graphics, typical of a news broadcast, and includes social media icons and a YouTube channel link at the bottom, encouraging viewers to follow and subscribe for more content. The overall theme suggests a discussion or analysis of Bola Tinubu's political stance and its relevance to Nigeria.
